body_html:
FYI

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "John W. Zeiger" <zeiger@litohio.com>
Date: December 19, 2007 6:28:50 PM EST
To: <DKIESQ@aol.com>
Subject: PERSONAL & CONFIDENTIAL

Darren:
 
    Thank you for the transactional documents you forwarded last evening.  After reviewing them, I would prefer to have an assignment agreement for each of the four assets.  I have therefore taken to heart your invitation to revise the documents and enclose my proposed revisions.
 
    Obviously, we will also need letters of instruction regarding the Apple stock and the Bear Stearns Asset Backed Securities Overseas Ltd. interests.  Assuming the enclosed assignment agreements are acceptable to you, we can finalize these two additional documents on Thursday. 
 
    My client is eager to execute documents on Thursday.  I will call you Thursday morning to review where we stand.
 
    Thank you for your help throughout this process.
 
 
JWZ

***CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE***
This email and/or accompanying documents may contain confidential or legally privileged information.  The information is intended only for the use of the person(s) named above.  If you are not the intended recipient, any disclosure, copying, distribution or taking any action on the contents of the attached information is strictly prohibited.  If you received this email in error, please immediately notify us by telephone at (614)365-9900 or by email at zeiger@litohio.com to arrange for return of this information.
